chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-250 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case For hearing of main case 03-11-2025 Mr. Saif-ur-Rehman Naich, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Sheeraz Fazal, Advocate for respondents-university a/w Dr. Zulfiqar Ali Shaikh, Registrar, SALU, Khairpur. Mr. Agha Athar Pathan, Assistant A.G. **** Learned counsel for the respondent–University files a statement along with the original Marks Certificate and Degree Certificate, which are taken on record and copies of statements have been provided to learned counsel for the petitioner. The original Marks Certificate and Degree Certificate are retained with the Additional Registrar of this Court, who shall hand over the same to the petitioner after due verification and identification. Since the grievance of the petitioner stands redressed, the instant petition, having served its purpose, is hereby disposed of accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
